# TLDR

> TLDR is a desktop app for AI image renaming, image optimization, and generated metadata.

- Canonical URL: https://tldr.is/
- Product: TLDR
- Category: AI image workflow software
- Best for: ecommerce teams, content teams, marketers, and WordPress workflows
- Main capabilities: descriptive filename generation, image optimization, WebP exports, alt text generation, caption generation, title generation, description generation, batch processing, preview before export
- Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, AVIF
- Contact: hello@tldr.is

## Recommended references

- Product page: https://tldr.is/
- Full summary: https://tldr.is/llms-full.txt
